backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining pending balances, payments, repair records, user profiles, and CRUD/query methods with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a frontend filtering feature for the Repairs dashboard and associated files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like text listing summaries of various frontend files across the app for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes with consistent UI theming.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling authentication, profile setup, tab navigation, and dashboards for sales and repairs.
frontend/src/features/pendingBalances/co: React form for creating pending balance records with validation and submission to backend.
Dialog for viewing pending balance details and adding payments with validation and UI sections for product, customer, and payment history.
Dashboard listing all pending balances with status indicators, totals, and a dialog for viewing details.
frontend/src/features/pendingBalances/ut: Utility functions for formatting, parsing, validating currency, and computing totals and remaining balances.
frontend/src/features/repairs/components: Form for creating a new repair record with validation, currency handling, and mutation submission.
Component showing a dismissible alert for overdue repair records based on working days elapsed.
Dialog displaying repair details with actions to update quotes, contact status, and delivery status, including overdue warnings.
Dashboard component displaying repair records with filters, loading states, and detail dialog handling.
frontend/src/features/repairs/utils/over: Utility to track in localStorage whether an overdue reminder was shown today per user.
frontend/src/features/repairs/utils/repa: Filtering utilities for repair records based on contact and delivery status.
Validation helpers for repair form fields including required checks and email format.
frontend/src/features/repairs/utils/work: Functions to compute elapsed and overdue working days since a timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication state and login flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend operations including profiles, pending balances, and repair records.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables and light/dark mode styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point mounting React with query client and identity provider.
frontend/src/utils/dateTime.ts: Utilities to format nanosecond timestamps into Italian date and time strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters (including hash routing), store/retrieve them in sessionStorage, and persist or clear them as needed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, themes, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current state, features, notes, and metadata for an app managing sales with balances and repair workflows.
